prompt: A cinematic dark-fantasy full-body portrait of a fierce warrior queen walking forward across a rugged, autumn-toned field at golden hour, accompanied by 1 large wolf at her right side. She has very long windblown deep copper red hair streaming dramatically to the left, with an ornate metallic headpiece on one side. Her face is partly obscured by shadow for a mysterious, faceless look. She wears ultra-detailed biomechanical elven armor in pale silver, ivory, and champagne metal, shaped like a sculpted bodice with filigree, engraved lines, layered shoulder plates, articulated gauntlets, decorated thigh armor, and armored boots. The outfit includes 1 flowing translucent skirt panel in beige and 1 long torn crimson-orange cape or veil trailing behind her, filled with glowing ember-like perforations and scattered sparkling particles. In her right hand she carries 1 tall ceremonial spear-staff with an intricate bladed head and multiple hanging chains and charms. The wolf is highly detailed, grey-white and muscular, wearing matching ornamental armor and harness pieces with metallic accents and red markings. The environment is a windswept mountainous wilderness with blurred rocky hills in the background, glowing dust, embers, and backlit haze. Lighting is warm, low sun, dramatic rim light, volumetric glow, rich contrast, shallow depth of field, hyper-detailed textures, epic fantasy realism, dynamic motion, powerful goddess-like presence, centered composition, vertical 2:3 format.
